name: TradeZella
description_short: Feature-rich trading journal with trade replay, backtesting, and advanced analytics for serious traders.
description_long:
TradeZella is one of the most popular trading journal platforms on the market, designed for traders who want comprehensive post-trade analysis and visual replay capabilities. The platform automatically imports trades from most major brokers and provides detailed breakdowns of performance by strategy, setup, time of day, and dozens of other filters.

The standout feature is TradeZella's Trade Replay, which lets you visually step through your trades tick-by-tick to understand what happened and why. Combined with full backtesting capabilities in the Pro plan, it gives traders a complete toolkit for strategy refinement and performance improvement.

TradeZella is particularly popular among prop firm traders who need to manage multiple accounts and track performance across different funding challenges. The Pro plan supports up to 20 accounts, making it ideal for traders juggling several prop firm evaluations simultaneously.
pros: Excellent trade replay feature for visual learning
Supports up to 20 accounts on Pro plan
Automatic broker imports from most platforms
cons: Basic plan limited to single account
Can be overwhelming for beginners with all the data points
meta_description: Feature-rich trading journal with trade replay, backtesting, and advanced analytics for serious traders.
